guidelines: Use Playfair Display for all headings to establish a premium, editorial, luxury corporate feel.
Use Poppins for body copy, form inputs, buttons, and data tables to ensure maximum legibility.
Avoid centering text by default; use left alignment for body copy and dense info.
Generous spacing: use p-8 to p-12 for containers with borders.
Containers must use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl to fit the user request.

ui_style.shadows: shadow-sm for resting state, shadow-xl for hover states (soft ambient shadows)
ui_style.mood: Professional, Clean, Bright, Trustworthy, Premium, Corporate, Minimal, Sophisticated.

interactions: Button hover: smooth transition to gold (#C8A24A) bg or slight lift.
Card hover: image zoom (scale-105) combined with shadow elevation.
Fade Up / Fade Left / Fade Right: Subtle entrance animations using framer-motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1, duration 0.5s).
restrictions: Keep it professional and fast loading.

hero.overlay: Very LIGHT navy or white/20 gradient to ensure it feels bright and clean. Text needs sufficient text-shadow for contrast.

cards.lifestyle_cards: Horizontal layouts, image on one side, text on the other. Card hover effects applied.
cards.room_cards: Rooms is the BIGGEST section. Include image sliders per room type, features list, and Book Now CTA.
cards.pricing_cards: Elegant tiered design for Twin Sharing (15k-20.5k), Private (29-34.5k), and Front Side Private (30-35.5k). Highlight meal options.

navigation.style: Sticky, semi-bold nav links, large spacing, luxury feel, glass effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/90).
navigation.links: Visible on desktop. Do not hide all links behind a hamburger menu on desktop viewports.

floating_buttons.position: fixed bottom-6 right-6 flex flex-col gap-3 z-50

admin_dashboard.style: Clean, Shadcn UI components, dense table for inquiries, simple login.

components.gallery: Masonry layout with lightbox for viewing larger images.
components.reviews: Google Reviews testimonial cards in a grid or carousel.
components.location: Large Google Maps embed with address.

hero_exterior.description: Modern apartment building exterior against a blue sky, used for hero section.

hero_exterior_alt.description: Contemporary apartment building with glass balconies.

room_private.description: Sophisticated private bedroom with blue accent wall and natural light.

room_twin.description: Elegant twin sharing room with cozy beds.

amenity_gym.description: Sleek modern gym interior with geometric lights.

amenity_dining.description: Modern dining hall with wooden table and chairs.

amenity_lounge.description: Modern living room/lounge area with large window.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #0E2A47 has a contrast ratio of > 4.5:1. Ensure text over images has dark overlays or text-shadow.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button', data-testid='room-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Playfair Display and Poppins fonts (e.g., via next/font or standard import).
Do not use generic placeholder images. Use the provided high-quality Unsplash/Pexels URLs. Missing categories must use contextual stock imagery, not dummy placeholders.
Build the UI focusing on a bright, premium corporate look.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard components like Forms, Tabs, Accordion, and Admin Table.
For the Room Showcase section, implement an image slider (e.g., Embla Carousel via Shadcn) to display multiple room photos.
For the Gallery section, use a masonry layout (CSS columns or a library like react-photo-album) with a lightbox functionality.
Add a fixed floating action bar (WhatsApp, Call, Book Visit) on the bottom right.
Ensure the hero overlay is VERY LIGHT, letting the building's bright feel shine through while maintaining text legibility (use text-shadow or a localized gradient behind the text).
Keep animations subtle (framer-motion fade-ups, CSS transition image zoom on hover).
Create a protected /admin route displaying a simple Shadcn Table of inquiries.
